qa_pairs.question: Which workshops have the name exactly ABC 2007?

qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop
JOIN acceptance ON workshop.workshop_id = acceptance.workshop_id
JOIN submission ON acceptance.submission_id = submission.submission_id
WHERE submission.author = 'Sherman Smith' AND workshop.name = 'Conference 2007' AND submission.scores >= 78.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which workshop entities with name equal to 'Conference 2007', having at least one related acceptance record (linked on workshop.workshop_id = acceptance.workshop_id), whose acceptance record itself has at least one related submission record (linked on acceptance.submission_id = submission.submission_id) with author equal to 'Sherman Smith' and scores at least '78.0'?

qa_pairs.question: Which workshops that include January 14 have the name 2008 qualification and feature submissions by Sammy Green from Florida?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop
JOIN acceptance ON workshop.workshop_id = acceptance.workshop_id
JOIN submission ON acceptance.submission_id = submission.submission_id
WHERE workshop.date LIKE '%January 14%' AND workshop.name = '2008 qualification' AND submission.college = 'Florida' AND submission.author = 'Sammy Green'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which workshop entities with date matching '%January 14%' and name equal to '2008 qualification', having at least one related acceptance record (linked on workshop.workshop_id = acceptance.workshop_id), whose acceptance record itself has at least one related submission record (linked on acceptance.submission_id = submission.submission_id) with college equal to 'Florida' and author equal to 'Sammy Green'?
